assertions.query: MATCH (:MarkdownDocument {`src.path`: 'source.md'})-[e:MD_LINKS_TO]->(d:MarkdownDocument) RETURN d.`src.path`, e.`md.link_target` ORDER BY d.`src.path`
MATCH (d:MarkdownDocument) WHERE d.`src.path` IN ['shared-one.md', 'shared-two.md', 'unique-target.md'] RETURN d.`src.path`, d.`md.aliases` ORDER BY d.`src.path`
